candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; best top-line measure and matches NET SALES numerically.
Alternative revenue label that matches Total Revenue and may serve as fallback if needed.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, with Total Revenue preferred.

candidates.why: Best match for cost of sales / direct operating input costs across most years.
Appears to be a component used in 2021 when Materials and services is missing; useful fallback for label changes/disaggregation.

variables.notes: Materials and services is the primary COGS-style line. Purchases during the period is included as a fallback for the earlier year where COGS appears disaggregated.

candidates.why: Could be overhead in some firms, but here it appears as a 2021 component under Materials and services, so likely part of COGS rather than SG&A.
Core operating overhead bucket covering personnel costs across years.
Subcomponent of Employee benefit expenses, so less preferred than the broader populated overhead bucket.
Overhead-like compensation item, but appears to be a subcomponent within employee benefit expenses.
Core operating overhead bucket and strong SG&A proxy.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement SG&A expense.
Operational metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total line is present. Selected the best operating overhead buckets and excluded D&A, COGS-like Materials and services, and likely COGS component External services.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Only explicit R&D-related line present, though it is amortization and appears below operating profit in supplemental disclosure.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: No dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line is visible. Mapped the only explicit R&D-related line to XRD, but did not include it in XSGA_COMPONENTS because it is supplemental amortization disclosed below operating profit.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense line; useful fallback if specific interest rows are unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses - financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most direct and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component for lease liabilities; appropriate secondary fallback.
Too broad / miscellaneous; weak fallback only.
Net finance cost line; acceptable only if specific interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of the lease-interest line; less preferred than the main statement row.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses - financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Using a priority list: specific interest expense first, then lease-interest, then broader finance expense labels as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests and likely also Hybrid Bond, so less preferred when owner equity exists.
Balancing item, not a substantive equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Whole balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-owner equity line selected to avoid double counting non-controlling interests in BE + MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
This appears to include Hybrid Bond plus non-controlling interests in 2025, so it would overstate MIB.
Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not a minority interest balance sheet line.

variables.notes: Selected the clean balance sheet NCI line. Avoided Minority Interest because its 2025 amount appears contaminated by Hybrid Bond.
